2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

BIOE372 Biostatistics for Experimental Design and Data Analysis (3 Credits)

This course will instruct students in the fundamentals of probability and statistics through examples in biological phenomenon, the design of bioengineering experiments, and clinical data analysis. Fundamentals covered in the course include probability distributions, hypothesis testing, power analysis, regression analysis, and correlation analysis. Prerequisite: BIOE120, BIOE121, and BIOE241.
